description: Use this API to return the identifier of the next machine connected to a bus. Each time ‘NXTMAC’ is called it returns the next machine identifier in ascending order. ‘INIMAC’ must first be called to establish the plant bus number. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, id = nxtmac(ibus)

error_codes.description: ‘INIMAC’ was not called for bus ‘IBUS’; ‘ID’ unchanged.
